privileged_info_summary: Verified that the task operates within a synthetic KStars/INDI simulation environment without real external observation data. The target observatory configuration parameters explicitly generated via setup_task.sh and checked by verifier.py accurately match the metadata claims: Siding Spring site latitude (-31.2722) and longitude (149.0661). The explicitly requested targets (Sirius, Canopus, Alpha Centauri) and the requisite output report paths (/home/ga/Documents/dome_commissioning_plan.txt, /home/ga/Documents/dome_sync_report.csv, and /home/ga/Documents/dome_slaved_evidence.png) all exactly match the provided descriptions, export scripts, and verifier scoring logic.
